title: Magnificent Obsession
writer: Sarah Y. Mason, Victor Heerman, George O'Neil
actors: Irene Dunne, Robert Taylor, Charles Butterworth
plot: The life of spoiled rich Robert Merrick is saved through the use of a hospital's sole resuscitator, but because the medical device cannot be in two places at once, it results in the death of Dr. Hudson, a selfless, brilliant surge...
